title: Better Client Side Minecraft (Discontinued)
description: BetterCraft Enhances Minecraft Without Adding Any Items To Minecraft. Using Client-Side Mods, Resource Packs, And Shaders Kinda Like Optifine Just It Has Resource Pack, Shaders, And Other Mods That Change Little Things In Minecraft
body:
- ### This Pack Has Been Discontinued, Check Out My New Pack [FunkyClient](https://modrinth.com/modpack/funkyclient)

![This is an image of the title and the description of the pack. Bettercraft Enhances Minecraft Without Adding Anything To Minecraft Using Client-Sided Mods, Reource Packs, And Shaders Kinda Like Optifine Just It has Resource Packs, Shaders, And Other Mods That Change Little Things In Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/fdbd762022188526232acb523e7c277e58c2bb11.png)
![This is an image of Bettercraft's Custom Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/a286e7419ea6d2a43a2aaf00c5f6b199b50bddb6.png)
![This is an image of the better clouds mod in this modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/7e8423d386791b0f6862c5ba816b92cf73a2e593.png)
![like Chat heads adds heads of the players in chat, armor chroma adds armor color on the armor chroma to match the armor your wearing, and blur in the ui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/a670ff3c383d37df962acdb413532b8590bc6054.png)
![This is a image showcase of the mini map in the upper right side of your screen and the full screen map witch you can open with M](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/23d0827dac21dce34fa7113b1b5f15702ae23ae1.png)
![the loading screen shows an image of what you last saw before leaving the world or server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/edda165a040727084fcd0c38727ab08d2f9e1870.png)
![This is an image of the first person model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/5275d68e9506f1e4ca9892928d2bd75d96a18148.png)
![Adds dynamic lighting and a gamma adjuster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/ee6e1e3454955da7e6f0132d72024f45970f7dbf.png)
![This is an image of the boards that are added on to blocks and items of certain rarities and indicators of new items in your inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/a321e1011ea778a9ceeb472248625256163e81ef.png)
![this is the first image showcase of shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/33b13d76b988d901a440fc4801faabd4f4083e68.png)
![this is the second image showcase of shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/c002b83d1103ecfecbbc07a1faaf729afad84261.png)
![this is the Third image showcase of shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/85a7bf53009872dc54d267e280b402c10bc2d6ab.png)
![this is the fourth image showcase of shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/1a129dc6cfa930f9bd01c90acc643f9c80b32fb4.png)
![This is an image showcasing the enchantment resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/96fa05840bbaeadd8868096bfd4b4ef3611f09da.png)
![This is a showcase of the custom textured potions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/a5196ee235cdc629305b39ba34ab780eee1becb0.png)
![This is a showcase of the custom skeletons pack and the better grass pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/6a81cce7a481b6e92793372ec451434951903486.png)
![This is an image of the resource packs better player animation and connected textures also showing the mod that has better tooltips](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCtSwghL/images/1161276b05d99f991fb599666004536cc0b47f59.png)

EXTRA INFORMATION:
This modpack adds many other things that i didt say above like this modpack has many mods that will help boost your FPS and other small tweaks to minecraft like
- 3D Skin Layers
- Advancement Plaques
- Allow Portal GUI
- Ambient Environment
- Ambient Sounds
- Apple Skin
- Better Statistics Screen
- Better F3
- Boat Item View
- Bobby
- CIT Resewn
- Camera Overhaul
- Chat Animations
- Chat Heads
- Chat Walk
- Cherished Worlds
- Continuity
- Eating Animation
- Edgeless Chat
- Explosive Enhancement
- FreeCam
- Midnight Controls
- Mouse Tweaks
- Recursive Resources
- Shulker ToolTip
- Third Person Map
- Visual WorkBench
- Visuality
- Wakes
- Zoom
And some more then just that
There are also more reasourcepacks that have been added that wernt shown
